patch.value: CI: combine pnpm test + pnpm test:coverage into single coverage run

ci.yml runs `pnpm test` (PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1) on all 5 matrix entries and then `pnpm test:coverage` again on ubuntu/20. The coverage run executes all tests too, so ubuntu/20 runs the full suite twice (~6min wasted/run). Make ubuntu/20 use `pnpm test:coverage` only; keep `pnpm test` only for the other matrix entries.
ubuntu-latest+node20 runs tests exactly once via coverage path; other matrix entries run pnpm test as before; CI overall time reduced by ~3min on ubuntu/20 entry.
